text:
building Codex Mission Control
Mac-first control room for Codex
shipping AI tools in public
followed by OpenAI people. 1.1万 followers. 6.4万 posts. GitHub profile link shows github.com/dicnunz/codex-...
notes: Profile anchors nic as a Codex Mission Control builder focused on Mac-first local orchestration.

text:
i kept running a bunch of codex chats at once and they started stepping on each other

two would try to use the same browser, inbox, github repo, desktop, or account surface at the same time

so i turned the setup into a small product:

Codex Mission Control

it gives Codex a control room for your Mac

it finds your projects, turns them into missions, locks shared surfaces, keeps approval packets, and lets you text the whole thing from Telegram

local-only
mac-first
no hosted account
notes: Core signal: product solves parallel Codex chats colliding on shared local and account surfaces.
Low product signal; preserved as visible context. Quoted post speculated about an OAI office incident.
